t5_hero.sub_en: Marigold is a warm, unintimidating yoga studio for every body and every level. Roll out a mat, slow right down, and book your first class online.

t5_teacher.title_en: Led by Sienna and the Marigold team.
t5_teacher.p1_en: Sienna founded Marigold after years of practising in rooms that felt like competitions. She wanted the opposite: a warm space, patient teaching, and absolutely no mirrors.
t5_teacher.p2_en: Every Marigold teacher is 500-hour trained, but more importantly they teach the room in front of them. You will be offered options every class, and resting is always allowed.

t5_about_story.p1_en: Marigold opened because its founder wanted somewhere unintimidating to practise: no mirrors, no competition, no perfect bodies up on the wall. Just a warm room and patient teaching.
